subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! A letter was dispatched, some time since, unto all the friends in those regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه ای بجمیع یاران آن دیار چندی پیش نگاشته و فرستاده شد
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @importance of community building, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @love and unity
